pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script copies/extracts the DICOM file to this directory
export_result.sh specifically checks for this path and verifier.py scores based on it
export_result.sh specifically checks for this path and verifier.py scores based on it
task.json description directly states the user's role
verifier.py uses a minimum CTR of 0.25 for full score and 0.10 for partial score, not 0.30
verifier.py uses a maximum CTR of 0.80 for full score and 0.95 for partial score, not 0.75
verifier.py checks for measurements, image export, and text report, but there is no evaluation logic verifying window_level settings were applied

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to evaluate a chest CT, but the actual DICOM data downloaded (from dicom_viewer_0002.zip) is a single 96-frame X-Ray Angiographic (XA) cine image. The verifier requires an exported PNG image >= 30KB and a text report >= 20 bytes. Full points for the Cardiothoracic Ratio (CTR) are awarded for a value between 0.25 and 0.80 (with partial points for 0.10 to 0.95), contradicting the metadata's narrower 0.30-0.75 range. The verifier also expects at least two distinct numerical measurements between 40 and 300mm. The required_features metadata claims window_level is necessary, but the verifier does not actually evaluate window/level settings.
